_meta.title: Allowable Cable Fill Area for Multiconductor Cables in Ladder, Ventilated-Trough, or Solid-Bottom Cable Trays for Cables Rated 2000 Volts or Less
_meta.note: Column 1: maximum allowable fill area for multiconductor cables where all cables are smaller than 4/0 AWG, ladder or ventilated trough tray. Column 2 (mixed sizes) is computed in code as Column1 - 1.2*Sd per the table note, where Sd is the sum of diameters of all cables 4/0 and larger. Values supplied by project engineer and cross-checked; verify against printed table.
_meta.trayContext: Aluminum ladder tray, 6 in. loading depth, NEMA VE 1 Class 20C. Depth and load class are display labels only; fill is governed by width per 392.22(A).
_meta.verify: Verify Column 1 values against printed NEC 2023 Table 392.22(A).
